nasb.text: So they put forward two men, Joseph called Barsabbas (who was also called Justus), and Matthias.

esv.text: And they put forward two, Joseph called Barsabbas, who was also called Justus, and Matthias.

cnv.text: 於是他們提出兩個人：約瑟和馬提亞，

ccb.text: 被提名的有别号巴撒巴又叫犹士都的约瑟和马提亚两个人。

csbs.text: 于是他们推举了两个人，就是那叫巴撒巴，又被称为犹斯托的约瑟，还有马提亚。
